entry.title: New: RES24-258 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
GRANTING A SPECIAL MANAGEMENT AREA MAJOR PERMIT TO ALLOW FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A NEW SINGLE-FAMILY DWELLING WITH AN ATTACHED GARAGE, A SWIMMING POOL, AN ACCESSORY DWELLING UNIT, AND OTHER IMPROVEMENTS IN MĀKAHA, OʻAHU.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
